title: PalLLM Outbox Envelope
description: One file under runtime-root/Bridge/Outbox/ — written by the sidecar after a successful chat orchestration, picked up by the Lua bridge for in-game rendering. Source of truth: src/PalLLM.Domain/Integration/Contracts.cs (OutboxEnvelope + OutboxChatReply).

EventType.description: Discriminator. Today always 'chat_reply'; future event types may share the envelope.

Source.description: Producer identifier. Always 'palllm' for sidecar-emitted envelopes.

TimestampUtc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the envelope was written.

RequestId.description: Correlation id matching the request that produced this reply.

CharacterId.description: Character id this reply is for, or null for unaddressed replies.

CharacterName.description: Display name of the responding character. Empty when not provided by the request.

TaskTag.description: Short tag describing the task category (e.g. 'tactical', 'social'). Empty if untagged.

AssistantMessage.description: The reply text. Multi-sentence; safe to render verbatim.

ResponsePath.description: Diagnostic trace of how the reply was produced (e.g. 'fallback-after-breaker-open', 'inference-completed', 'fallback-after-rate-limit').

UsedFallback.description: True when the deterministic fallback director produced this reply.

FallbackStrategy.description: When UsedFallback is true, names the specific strategy (e.g. 'narrative-recall', 'tactical-suggest').

FallbackPhase.description: Tier of the fallback path: 'primary' or 'emergency'.

Presentation.description: Always present. The Lua bridge consumes Presentation.Visual + Presentation.Audio cues to render the reply.

ActionIntent.description: Optional advisory action intent the Lua bridge may execute (subject to its own allowlist). Off by default; only mirrored into Bridge/Outbox when PalLLM:Automation:Enabled is true and PalLLM:Automation:EmitToOutbox remains enabled.

Type.description: Action type id, must match Automation:AllowedActions.

SpeechArtifact.description: Optional TTS artifact metadata. Present only when PalLLM:Tts:Enabled is true and the synthesis succeeded.

PresentationCuePlan.description: Paired visual + audio cues for rendering the reply. See PresentationCuePlanner for the full surface.

Family.description: Cue family classifier matching the fallback strategy.
